reviews.comment:
Muy mala la atencion especialmente en la cena,levantaron platos antes que terminemos todos
Respecto a el cuarto colchones incomodos,el baño muy malo,agua fria en la ducha

(Translated by Google)
The service was very poor, especially at dinner; they cleared the plates before we had all finished. Regarding the room, the mattresses were uncomfortable, the bathroom was terrible, and the shower water was cold.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR2Z2Z6bVJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Nos dieron  hamburguesas recalentadas,supuestamente estaban recién hechas pero  las recalentaron con el emboltorio plateado que traen. No tenían los precios exibidos y la cajera nos dijo de mala gana las distintas opciones. La nueva hamburguesa spice que ofrecen es un fraude. 11.000 pesos mal gastados.

(Translated by Google)
They gave us reheated hamburgers; supposedly they were freshly made, but they reheated them in the silver wrapping they come in. The prices weren't displayed, and the cashier reluctantly told us about the different options. The new "spice" burger they offer is a rip-off. 11,000 pesos wasted.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR2a0lMdnl3RRAB

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Cómo no vas a recibir efectivo como medio de pago ¿¿¿????

(Translated by Google)
How are you not going to accept cash as a means of payment????

reviewReply.comment: Hola Leonardo. Como estas? Si Aceptamos efectivo. Tiene que haber habido algun problem puntual. Te acordas que dia y hora pasaste? Para poderlo chequear?

reviews.comment:
Se tardan una eternidad en atenderte y los ves boludiando

(Translated by Google)

reviewReply.comment: Buenas Tardes. Lamentamos lo sucedido y vamos a trabajar para mejorarlo.
